Flow.description: Updates Sales-specific completed call date fields on SaaS Opportunities when Events associated to Opps are created or updated.

value.stringValue: OR( AND( [Event].RecordTypeId = '0121I000000OF4pQAG', OR( [Event].Meeting_Type__c ='ISR - 15 Minute Q&A Meeting', [Event].Meeting_Type__c ='ISR - Enterprise Q&A Call', [Event].Meeting_Type__c ='ISR - Round-Robin Q&A Call' ), [Event].Meeting_Completed__c = TRUE ), AND( [Event].RecordTypeId = '0123u000000yyQhAAI', OR( [Event].Meeting_Type_CP__c = 'ISR - 15 Minute QA Meeting', [Event].Meeting_Type_CP__c = 'ISR - Round-Robin QA Call' ), [Event].Meeting_Completed__c = TRUE ), AND( [Event].RecordTypeId = '0123u000000ivfIAAQ', [Event].Meeting_Completed__c = TRUE, ISPICKVAL([Event].Task__c, 'Call') ), AND( [Event].RecordTypeId = '0123u000000ivfIAAQ', ISPICKVAL([Event].Task__c, 'Call'), [Event].Became_Demo__c = TRUE, OR( [Event].Meeting_Completed__c = TRUE, [Event].Meeting_Incomplete__c = TRUE ) ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_1
formulas.expression: OR( AND( {!myVariable_current.RecordTypeId} = '0121I000000OF4pQAG', OR( {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Type__c} ='ISR - 15 Minute Q&A Meeting', {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Type__c} ='ISR - Enterprise Q&A Call', {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Type__c} ='ISR - Round-Robin Q&A Call' ), {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Completed__c} = TRUE ), AND( {!myVariable_current.RecordTypeId} = '0123u000000yyQhAAI', OR( {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Type_CP__c} = 'ISR - 15 Minute QA Meeting', {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Type_CP__c} = 'ISR - Round-Robin QA Call' ), {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Completed__c} = TRUE ), AND( {!myVariable_current.RecordTypeId} = '0123u000000ivfIAAQ', {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Completed__c} = TRUE, ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Task__c}, 'Call') ), AND( {!myVariable_current.RecordTypeId} = '0123u000000ivfIAAQ', ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Task__c}, 'Call'), {!myVariable_current.Became_Demo__c} = TRUE, OR( {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Completed__c} = TRUE, {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Incomplete__c} = TRUE ) ) )

value.stringValue: OR( AND( [Event].RecordTypeId = '0121I000000OF4pQAG', OR( [Event].Meeting_Type__c ='ISR - 15 Minute Q&A Meeting', [Event].Meeting_Type__c ='ISR - Enterprise Q&A Call', [Event].Meeting_Type__c ='ISR - Round-Robin Q&A Call' ), [Event].Meeting_Completed__c = TRUE ), AND( [Event].RecordTypeId = '0123u000000yyQhAAI', OR( [Event].Meeting_Type_CP__c = 'ISR - 15 Minute QA Meeting', [Event].Meeting_Type_CP__c = 'ISR - Round-Robin QA Call' ), [Event].Meeting_Completed__c = TRUE ), AND( [Event].RecordTypeId = '0123u000000ivfIAAQ', [Event].Meeting_Completed__c = TRUE, ISPICKVAL([Event].Task__c, 'Call') ), AND( [Event].RecordTypeId = '0123u000000ivfIAAQ', ISPICKVAL([Event].Task__c, 'Call'), [Event].Became_Demo__c = TRUE, OR( [Event].Meeting_Completed__c = TRUE, [Event].Meeting_Incomplete__c = TRUE ) ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_1_pmetrule
formulas.expression: OR( AND( {!myVariable_old.RecordTypeId} = '0121I000000OF4pQAG', OR( {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Type__c} ='ISR - 15 Minute Q&A Meeting', {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Type__c} ='ISR - Enterprise Q&A Call', {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Type__c} ='ISR - Round-Robin Q&A Call' ), {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Completed__c} = TRUE ), AND( {!myVariable_old.RecordTypeId} = '0123u000000yyQhAAI', OR( {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Type_CP__c} = 'ISR - 15 Minute QA Meeting', {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Type_CP__c} = 'ISR - Round-Robin QA Call' ), {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Completed__c} = TRUE ), AND( {!myVariable_old.RecordTypeId} = '0123u000000ivfIAAQ', {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Completed__c} = TRUE, ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.Task__c}, 'Call') ), AND( {!myVariable_old.RecordTypeId} = '0123u000000ivfIAAQ', ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.Task__c}, 'Call'), {!myVariable_old.Became_Demo__c} = TRUE, OR( {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Completed__c} = TRUE, {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Incomplete__c} = TRUE ) ) )

value.stringValue: OR( AND( [Event].RecordTypeId = '0121I000000OF4pQAG', OR( [Event].Meeting_Type__c ='ISR - Round-Robin Demo Call', [Event].Meeting_Type__c ='ISR - Personal Demo Call', [Event].Meeting_Type__c ='[Training] ISR Round Robin Demo', [Event].Became_Demo__c = TRUE ), OR( [Event].Meeting_Completed__c = TRUE ) ), AND( [Event].RecordTypeId = '0123u000000yyQhAAI', OR( [Event].Meeting_Type_CP__c = 'ISR - Round-Robin Demo Call', [Event].Meeting_Type_CP__c = 'ISR - Personal Demo Call', [Event].Meeting_Type_CP__c = 'Training - ISR Round Robin Demo', [Event].Meeting_Type_CP__c = 'Prospect Online Booking', [Event].Became_Demo__c = TRUE ), OR( [Event].Meeting_Completed__c = TRUE ) ), AND( [Event].RecordTypeId = '0123u000000ivfIAAQ', [Event].Became_Demo__c = TRUE, OR( [Event].Meeting_Completed__c = TRUE ) ), AND( [Event].RecordTypeId = '0123u000000ivfIAAQ', TEXT([Event].Type) = "Demo Call", OR( [Event].Meeting_Completed__c = TRUE ) ), AND( [Event].RecordTypeId = '0123u000000ivfNAAQ', [Event].Meeting_Completed__c = TRUE ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_4
formulas.expression: OR( AND( {!myVariable_current.RecordTypeId} = '0121I000000OF4pQAG', OR( {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Type__c} ='ISR - Round-Robin Demo Call', {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Type__c} ='ISR - Personal Demo Call', {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Type__c} ='[Training] ISR Round Robin Demo', {!myVariable_current.Became_Demo__c} = TRUE ), OR( {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Completed__c} = TRUE ) ), AND( {!myVariable_current.RecordTypeId} = '0123u000000yyQhAAI', OR( {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Type_CP__c} = 'ISR - Round-Robin Demo Call', {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Type_CP__c} = 'ISR - Personal Demo Call', {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Type_CP__c} = 'Training - ISR Round Robin Demo', {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Type_CP__c} = 'Prospect Online Booking', {!myVariable_current.Became_Demo__c} = TRUE ), OR( {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Completed__c} = TRUE ) ), AND( {!myVariable_current.RecordTypeId} = '0123u000000ivfIAAQ', {!myVariable_current.Became_Demo__c} = TRUE, OR( {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Completed__c} = TRUE ) ), AND( {!myVariable_current.RecordTypeId} = '0123u000000ivfIAAQ', TEXT({!myVariable_current.Type}) = "Demo Call", OR( {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Completed__c} = TRUE ) ), AND( {!myVariable_current.RecordTypeId} = '0123u000000ivfNAAQ', {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Completed__c} = TRUE ) )

value.stringValue: OR( AND( [Event].RecordTypeId = '0121I000000OF4pQAG', OR( [Event].Meeting_Type__c ='ISR - Round-Robin Demo Call', [Event].Meeting_Type__c ='ISR - Personal Demo Call', [Event].Meeting_Type__c ='[Training] ISR Round Robin Demo', [Event].Became_Demo__c = TRUE ), OR( [Event].Meeting_Completed__c = TRUE ) ), AND( [Event].RecordTypeId = '0123u000000yyQhAAI', OR( [Event].Meeting_Type_CP__c = 'ISR - Round-Robin Demo Call', [Event].Meeting_Type_CP__c = 'ISR - Personal Demo Call', [Event].Meeting_Type_CP__c = 'Training - ISR Round Robin Demo', [Event].Meeting_Type_CP__c = 'Prospect Online Booking', [Event].Became_Demo__c = TRUE ), OR( [Event].Meeting_Completed__c = TRUE ) ), AND( [Event].RecordTypeId = '0123u000000ivfIAAQ', [Event].Became_Demo__c = TRUE, OR( [Event].Meeting_Completed__c = TRUE ) ), AND( [Event].RecordTypeId = '0123u000000ivfIAAQ', TEXT([Event].Type) = "Demo Call", OR( [Event].Meeting_Completed__c = TRUE ) ), AND( [Event].RecordTypeId = '0123u000000ivfNAAQ', [Event].Meeting_Completed__c = TRUE ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_4_pmetrule
formulas.expression: OR( AND( {!myVariable_old.RecordTypeId} = '0121I000000OF4pQAG', OR( {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Type__c} ='ISR - Round-Robin Demo Call', {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Type__c} ='ISR - Personal Demo Call', {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Type__c} ='[Training] ISR Round Robin Demo', {!myVariable_old.Became_Demo__c} = TRUE ), OR( {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Completed__c} = TRUE ) ), AND( {!myVariable_old.RecordTypeId} = '0123u000000yyQhAAI', OR( {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Type_CP__c} = 'ISR - Round-Robin Demo Call', {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Type_CP__c} = 'ISR - Personal Demo Call', {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Type_CP__c} = 'Training - ISR Round Robin Demo', {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Type_CP__c} = 'Prospect Online Booking', {!myVariable_old.Became_Demo__c} = TRUE ), OR( {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Completed__c} = TRUE ) ), AND( {!myVariable_old.RecordTypeId} = '0123u000000ivfIAAQ', {!myVariable_old.Became_Demo__c} = TRUE, OR( {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Completed__c} = TRUE ) ), AND( {!myVariable_old.RecordTypeId} = '0123u000000ivfIAAQ', TEXT({!myVariable_old.Type}) = "Demo Call", OR( {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Completed__c} = TRUE ) ), AND( {!myVariable_old.RecordTypeId} = '0123u000000ivfNAAQ', {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Completed__c} = TRUE ) )

value.stringValue: OR( AND( [Event].RecordTypeId = '0121I000000OF4pQAG', [Event].Meeting_Type__c ='ISR - Decision Call', [Event].Meeting_Completed__c = TRUE ), AND( [Event].RecordTypeId = '0123u000000yyQhAAI', [Event].Meeting_Type_CP__c ='ISR - Decision Call', [Event].Meeting_Completed__c = TRUE ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_7
formulas.expression: OR( AND( {!myVariable_current.RecordTypeId} = '0121I000000OF4pQAG', {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Type__c} ='ISR - Decision Call', {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Completed__c} = TRUE ), AND( {!myVariable_current.RecordTypeId} = '0123u000000yyQhAAI', {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Type_CP__c} ='ISR - Decision Call', {!myVariable_current.Meeting_Completed__c} = TRUE ) )

value.stringValue: OR( AND( [Event].RecordTypeId = '0121I000000OF4pQAG', [Event].Meeting_Type__c ='ISR - Decision Call', [Event].Meeting_Completed__c = TRUE ), AND( [Event].RecordTypeId = '0123u000000yyQhAAI', [Event].Meeting_Type_CP__c ='ISR - Decision Call', [Event].Meeting_Completed__c = TRUE ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_7_pmetrule
formulas.expression: OR( AND( {!myVariable_old.RecordTypeId} = '0121I000000OF4pQAG', {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Type__c} ='ISR - Decision Call', {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Completed__c} = TRUE ), AND( {!myVariable_old.RecordTypeId} = '0123u000000yyQhAAI', {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Type_CP__c} ='ISR - Decision Call', {!myVariable_old.Meeting_Completed__c} = TRUE ) )

Flow.label: Sales Funnel - Completed Events on SaaS Opp

recordUpdates.name: myRule_1_A1
recordUpdates.label: Update Discovery Call Completed on Opp

recordUpdates.name: myRule_1_A2
recordUpdates.label: Update Account Owner to Assigned To user

recordUpdates.name: myRule_4_A1
recordUpdates.label: Update Demo Call Completed and Opp Owner

recordUpdates.name: myRule_4_A2
recordUpdates.label: Update Account Owner to Assigned To user
